summary: A government shutdown occurred in late 2025 (post 40556 asks if it ends before Nov 21, 2025). CR question for March 15, 2026 exists (post 41512). CP on underlying shutdown question at 30%, declining from ~39% over past week.
content: Post 40556 confirms there was a government shutdown before Nov 2025. The existence of post 41512 about a CR on March 15, 2026 suggests a CR may be in place through March. The CP trajectory on post 40919 shows a decline from ~39% in late December to 30% by Jan 4-5, suggesting forecasters are becoming less concerned about another shutdown before Feb 1. 70 forecasters on the underlying question.
